englishDefinitions: Combined two events so that they were presented or understood as one.
persianTranslation: دو رویداد را با هم درآمیخت
دو واقعه را با هم ترکیب کرد
examples: The film blended the two events together for dramatic effect.
The speaker blended the two events together in his account.
The article blended the two events together, which confused some readers.
